next_step: The next step at your finances
simplest_way: The simplest way to understand and manage your money
bring_all: Bring all your financial data together in a clear and structured view. See your cash flow in real time and always know how much you earn, spend, and save
built_to_simplify: Built to simplify financial management, the platform gives you clear insights and intuitive tools so you can stay in control without unnecessary complexity
take_controll: Take controll of your incomes and exchanges
take_controll_text: Track and manage all your income and expenses in one place with complete clarity. FiNext gives you a real-time view of your cash flow, helping you understand where your money comes from, where it goes, and how much you truly have available
intelligent_expense_text: Easily manage fixed and variable expenses, categorize them, and track which ones are tax-deductible. Set financial goals with deadlines and amounts, and FiNext will show your progress and tell you if your goals are achievable based on your current cash flow
smart_financial_text: FiNext helps you take full control of your finances by tracking income and expenses in a simple way. It automatically calculates your cash flow and gives you a clear monthly overview, so you always know how much you earn, spend, and save
